title: Smoky Indian Bitter Gourd Curry
description: A hearty, monsoon‑season curry that balances the bitterness of raw bitter gourd with smoky spices and a tangy finish.
instructions: Heat the oil in a deep pan over medium heat.
Add mustard and cumin seeds; let them splutter for 10‑15 seconds.
Sauté the chopped onion until translucent, about 3 min.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger; cook for 1 min until fragrant.
Stir in the tomato puree, turmeric, red chili powder, and garam masala; simmer for 5 min, letting the oil separate from the masala.
Add the sliced bitter gourd and pour in 1 cup water; season with salt.
Cover and cook on low heat for 20 min, stirring occasionally, until the bitter gourd is tender and the flavors meld.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
